issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.summary: [Backend] Invoice third tab - Wrong price component names in detail data tab

content.text: Create 3 Price component with same name
Create Group of price component with these prices
Create Billing data and run the billing
Check the generated invoice’s third tab
In third tab there is only 1 row for POD of price component because names are the same
If the names of prices are different all price component rows are the same
It is same logic for Group of price component’s prices and individual price components
Third tab should contain all price component rows which are used in invoice

status.description: This status is managed internally by Jira Software
status.name: Testing
